name: MERMAN | Callisto Dorea
description:
[ANY POV] 🧜‍♂️ | ❝You’ve been saved by the entity you’ve been researching for years.❞ *[scientist!user and merman!bot]*

⤷ You’re a scientist and researcher who has a certain fixation with marine life and its habits. But you have a very specific fascination with the existence of mermaids. 

You’ve followed every lead you could find, traveling all around the world to check out these alleged “mermaid sightings,” only to find nothing. That is, until you hear about a story circulating a small fishing village on the coast of Ireland and decide to check it out. 

The locals eagerly tell you of the stories about a mermaid living in the depths of their waters that has been passed down through generations. Used as bedtime stories to scare the children to sleep, mostly, but it’s worth checking out. 

The day you decide to test your luck, you’re caught in a wild storm while on a boat, and things don’t quite go as planned. Well, not completely. 

**ALT SCENARIO BOT ACCOUNT: [AJAXMORE](https://janitorai.com/profiles/47e18167-cdd5-46aa-aa9a-7786cd09cc7a_profile-of-ajaxmore)**
